success_criteria.criterion: ADAR2 IP6 site in top 3 pockets

success_criteria.note: SASA measured in apo state; IP6 removed during preparation. Crystal structure with IP6 bound shows ~0 Å². Apo-state SASA reflects the open cavity.

success_criteria.criterion: Electrostatic potential at pocket center > 5 kT/e
≥6 basic residues near IP6 binding pocket
success_criteria.target: ≥6 basic residues within 5 Å of IP molecule
success_criteria.actual: 1 within 5 Å, 7 within 8 Å, 8 within 10 Å of centroid
success_criteria.note: Distances measured from centroid of IP6-coordinating sidechain atoms (NZ/NH1). 8 Å from centroid ≈ 5 Å from IP6 ligand surface (IP6 radius ~3 Å). 7 basic residues within 8 Å confirms the strong positive charge cluster.

success_criteria.criterion: AlphaFold vs crystal RMSD < 2 Å for binding region
Clear score separation between buried and surface
success_criteria.target: No overlap between positive and negative controls
success_criteria.note: Overlap: Yes. Positive mean: 0.413, Negative mean: 0.416.

success_criteria.criterion: Pocket depth separation: positives >15 Å, negatives <8 Å
success_criteria.actual: Positive mean: 20.7 Å, Negative mean: 10.5 Å
